title: Campaigns - Honiton, Sidmouth and Tiverton Liberal Democrats
headings: h2: Richard Foord and the Lib Dem team are campaigning to improve our area and make sure your voice is heard
text_excerpt: Campaigns - Honiton, Sidmouth and Tiverton Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Honiton, Sidmouth and Tiverton Liberal Democrats Meet Richard Household Bills Campaigns News Get in touch Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join Campaigns Rural Broadband Rollout Stop Sewage Dumping Flood defences Save Seaton Hospital Fix NHS Dentistry Community Banking News Newsletter Campaigns Richard Foord and the Lib Dem team are campaigning to improve our area and make sure your voice is heard Find out more about our currrent campaigns below. Save Seaton Hospital Join the fight View Stop sewage dumping Add your name View Fix NHS Dentistry Sign the petition View Community Banking Back the campaign View Dartmoor wild camping Find out more View The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
